name: N+1 query pattern in order summaries
description: Tests whether the reviewer catches a database query inside a loop (N+1 pattern) where db.find_product is called once per order instead of batch-loading products.

expected_findings.description: get_order_summaries calls db.find_product(order['product_id']) inside a for loop iterating over all orders. This is the classic N+1 query pattern — one query per order instead of batch-loading all needed products before the loop.

expected_clean.description: Adding order status constants — pure constant definitions with no logic
